title: Why electricity has become the world's most valuable commodity in the age of AI
description: Artificial intelligence is transforming electricity into the world's most valuable resource, according to Bloom Energy founder KR Sridhar. Calling power the “invisible gold” of the AI age, he said the rapid growth of data centres and advanced AI chips is driving an unprecedented surge in electricity demand, making reliable and affordable power critical to economic growth and technological leadership.
